parameters.formDescription:
Select an entrée to add to your current order. You’ll be guided through any required customizations, followed by optional sides. Each selection will be added to your existing items.
Please review each item carefully before continuing.

values.option: Cowboy Chik’n Sandwich - Grilled Cowboy Chik’n, Lettuce, Tomato, Ranch, Bac'n. $13.00
Chik'n Club Sub - Grilled Chik’n Bac’n Cheese on a bed of Lettuce and Tomatoes. $15.00
Chik'n Fried Chik'n Sub - Crispy Fried Chik'n on a hoagie with lettuce, tomato, ranch. $13.00
Chik'n Poppers -  Crispy chikn dippers or sauced with choice of BBQ, Garlic Parm, Jerk, Buffalo, Lemon Pepper Wet. $10.00
Korean "Pork" Dumpling Tacos - “Pork”, pickled slaw, aioli, and sauce on a dumpling shell. Set of 4 tacos. $10.00
Philly Sub - “Stek” OR Chik’n with sautéed onions & bell peppers. $13.00
Rocktown Bourbon Chik'n Sliders - Rocktown distillery bourbon‑infused chik’n with fresh slaw and aioli on a garlic butter slider bun. $12.00
Sides - Plain or Loaded Fries, Water, Fresh Cold‑Pressed Juices, or Two Chocolate Chip Cookies.

options.formTitle: The Utopia Deli Online Order Menu. Place an order 12:30 p.m. - 7:30 p.m. Mon–Fri.
options.formDescription:
Welcome to The Utopia Deli online ordering experience.

Enter your contact information and choose your entrée to begin your order. 
You’ll be guided through any customizations for your entrée, followed by optional sides like fries, cookies, water, or cold‑pressed juices.

All orders are prepared fresh. Please review your selections carefully before checkout.
Sorry — the item you selected is not available right now. Please choose a different entrée to continue your order.

options.formDescription: Build your perfect Philly by adding extras, increasing toppings, substituting sauces, or removing ingredients. Add extra aioli, extra cheese, or extra peppers & onions. nodes.name: Chik'n Fried Chik'n Sub modifier page

options.formDescription: Personalize your Chik’n Club by adding toppings, increasing flavor, substituting sauces, or removing ingredients. Add jalapeños, extra aioli, or extra cheese. Remove lettuce, tomato, bac’n, chives, or ranch.

Customize your Cowboy Chik’n by adding sauces, increasing intensity, substituting sauces, or removing toppings. Choose from BBQ, Buffalo, Jerk, Truth Sauce, Garlic Parm, or Lemon Pepper. Swap ranch for another sauce, or remove lettuce, tomato, bac’n, chives, or ranch.
